languages.text: Предатель вывел из строя зенитный комплекс, чтобы открыть врагу путь для воздушного налета.

traits.locale_text: Предатель вывел из строя зенитный комплекс, чтобы открыть врагу путь для воздушного налета.

languages.text: The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft battery, opening the path for an aerial assault by the enemy.
languages.original_text: Предатель вывел из строя зенитный комплекс, чтобы открыть врагу путь для воздушного налета.

traits.locale_text: The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft battery, opening the path for an aerial assault upon the enemy.

The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft battery, opening the path for an aerial assault by the enemy.
The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft battery, opening the path for an aerial assault by the enemy.

languages.text: Der Verräter hat die Flugabwehrbatterie deaktiviert und dem Feind damit einen Luftangriff ermöglicht.
languages.original_text: The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft battery, opening the path for an aerial assault by the enemy.

traits.locale_text: Der Verräter hat die Flugabwehrbatterie deaktiviert und dem Feind damit einen Luftangriff ermöglicht.

languages.text: La taupe a désactivé la batterie antiaérienne, permettant ainsi à l'ennemi de lancer une attaque aérienne.
languages.original_text: The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft battery, opening the path for an aerial assault by the enemy.

traits.locale_text: La taupe a désactivé la batterie antiaérienne, permettant ainsi à l'ennemi de lancer une attaque aérienne.

languages.text: 叛徒破坏了防空炮，为敌人的空袭铺平了道路。
languages.original_text: The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft battery, opening the path for an aerial assault by the enemy.

traits.locale_text: 叛徒破坏了防空炮，为敌人的空袭铺平了道路。

languages.text: El traidor ha inutilizado la batería antiaérea, despejando así el camino para que el enemigo pueda atacar por el aire.
languages.original_text: The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft battery, opening the path for an aerial assault by the enemy.

traits.locale_text: El traidor ha inutilizado la batería antiaérea, despejando así el camino para que el enemigo pueda atacar por el aire.

languages.text: 裏切り者は、宮殿から弾幕射撃を奪い、敵の空襲に道を開くため、対空システムを無効にした。
languages.original_text: The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft system to deprive the palace of barrage fire and open the way for an air raid by the enemy.

languages.text: Hain, uçaksavar bataryasını devre dışı bırakarak düşmanın hava saldırısına yol açtı.
languages.original_text: The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft battery, opening the path for an aerial assault by the enemy.

traits.locale_text: Hain, uçaksavar bataryasını devre dışı bırakarak düşmanın hava saldırısına yol açtı.
